original: You’re not rightly sure how this baby miniature giant kor’diiak found its way into your inventory, but it’s there all the same. According to your Codex, it will take decades to mature, so for the time being, you have a cuddly pet.\n\n(This item is nothing but a cute souvenir.)
context: <<POS:10078910>> e.tooltip='You’re not rightly sure how this baby miniature giant kor’di'
